specific_question: How many new firewall rules did the cybersecurity specialist at MediConn deploy to protect telehealth session routing within MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform between April 1 and September 30, 2025?
answer: Between Q2 and Q3 2025, the cybersecurity specialist deployed 19 new firewall rules to protect telehealth session routing within MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform from malicious packet injection attempts.
dr_question: By Q4 2025, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs) into its virtual healthcare platform to ensure compliance for both internal systems and third-party vendors, while effectively mitigating emerging cyber threats?
